pending.body: `finding_summary`: `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:451-563`, `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:591-610`, and `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:671-677` make `ScenarioState.issues` the authoritative bead graph for `br list/show` and `bv --robot-next`. The mock adapters never reread `.beads/issues.jsonl`, so any code under test that rewrites the export directly will leave the filesystem and mock responses out of sync. That is a real risk in this codebase because reconciliation paths already rewrite `issues.jsonl` directly (for example `src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs:1621-1624` and `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:2059-2071`). This breaks the fixture’s stated contract that mocked responses stay consistent with workspace mutations. `affected_files`: [`src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs`]. `remediation_hint`: make `.beads/issues.jsonl` the source of truth for read commands, or refresh `ScenarioState` from disk before answering `list/show/robot-next`.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 10 -> Plan and Implement
